videos.title: A new way to do CSS transforms!
videos.description: Covers the standalone translate property and how it differs from transform: translate() with practical examples.

videos.title: Learn CSS Transform In 15 Minutes
videos.description: Comprehensive coverage of translate function including 2D and 3D translations with visual demonstrations.

videos.title: #30 CSS Transform Property - CSS Full Tutorial
videos.description: Explains CSS translate along with other transform functions, showing how translation works in 2D space.

videos.title: 3D CSS - lighting, animations, and more!
videos.description: Uses translateZ and 3D translations extensively while building 3D scenes and animated objects with CSS.
